title.en: Beetroot Betacyanin — Different Red Pigment Class
title.ko: 비트 베타시아닌 — 다른 적색 색소 계열

subtitle.en: betacyanin (the red of beetroot, prickly pear, bougainvillea) is not anthocyanin — it's a betalain, nitrogen-containing, found only in Caryophyllales; absorbs at 537 nm
subtitle.ko: 베타시아닌(비트·선인장·부겐빌레아)은 안토시아닌이 아닌 betalain — 질소 함유, Caryophyllales에만, 537 nm 흡수

description.en: Beetroot juice darkens with concentration. Pigments mutually exclusive with anthocyanin across plant kingdom — convergent red colour, divergent biochemistry.
description.ko: 농도에 따라 비트즙 진해짐. 식물계서 안토시아닌과 상호 배제 — 수렴 적색, 다른 생화학.
